name: Android Upload Signing
description: Encrypted Android upload keystore credentials used by Deploy to sign App Bundles before publishing them to Google Play.

credential_fields.name: upload_keystore_base64
credential_fields.label: Upload keystore (base64)
credential_fields.description: Base64-encoded JKS or PKCS12 upload keystore. The decrypted file exists only while Deploy signs an App Bundle.

credential_fields.name: upload_key_password
credential_fields.label: Upload key password
credential_fields.description: Optional when the key password is the same as the keystore password.
